Headaches & Migraines Back Pain Irritable Bowel Syndrome Hormone Imbalance Pediatrics More Conditions We Treat Discover The IHI Way— How We Do Health Differently A journey toward whole-body wellness rooted in compassion, expertise, and lifelong healing. At Integrated Health of Indiana, we believe health is more than absence of disease—it's thriving in body, mind, and spirit. The "IHI Way" is our guiding philosophy: combining functional medicine, natural therapies, and patient education to uncover root causes and promote lasting wellness. Founded by Dr. Trevor Miller and Jessica Miller, RN, we bring together decades of experience in chiropractic, nursing, clinical nutrition, hormone support, and lab diagnostics. We don't just treat symptoms, we partner with you to understand your unique body, your story, and design a plan that empowers transformation. Whether you're struggling with pain, digestive issues, hormone imbalance, or looking to optimize energy, our compassionate team is here to guide you. At IHI, you're more than a patient, you're a collaborator on your healing journey. Join Our 7 O'Clock Talk Each week we have a 7 O'Clock talk about health. Watch us live on Facebook or YouTube! Our quality staff is here for all your health needs. Chiropractic Care & Services: holistic, natural care that utilizes treating the central nervous system. Functional Medicine: root cause-focused approach to healthcare for long-term patient wellbeing. Factors like genetics, diet, lifestyle, hormones, and optimal lab results are considered in creating personalized care plans. Shockwave Therapy. Nutritional IV Therapy. Thrive In 63 program.
